## Content Checklist

<!-- For content-related PRs, verify: -->
- [ ] Follows markdown templates (`todo/plan/markdown-templates.md`)
- [ ] All required files created (what.md, guide.md, Interview.md, Visual.md)
- [ ] Mermaid diagrams validated (run `node scripts/validate-mermaid.js`)
- [ ] Content validated (run `node scripts/validate-content.js`)
- [ ] Updated `todo/plan/topics.md` if adding new topic
- [ ] No broken links
- [ ] Spelling and grammar checked

- [ ] Verified Mermaid diagrams render correctly
